description: The University Corporation for Atmospheric Research (UCAR) needs a planetary circulation diagnostic for a new textbook infographic. Using Panoply and the Sea Level Pressure data in ~/PanoplyData/, create a 1D Zonal Mean SLP profile. Export the plot, the raw CSV data array, and a document identifying the latitudes of major pressure belts to the output folder specified in the analysis brief at ~/Desktop/circulation_brief.txt.
